summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Stripe removal and payment methods. All 12 backend tests passed. Frontend checkout page correctly shows only 3 payment options (PayPal, Mobile Money, COD) with NO Stripe/Credit Card option. Fixed critical bug in CheckoutPage.js where Stripe-related code was causing runtime errors.

minor.issue: Comment still mentions 'stripe' as payment_method option in Pydantic model (line 172)

fixed_bugs.issue: Stripe polling code (pollStripeStatus, searchParams) was still present causing runtime errors - searchParams was undefined
fixed_bugs.fix: Removed lines 75-103 containing Stripe polling code

fixed_bugs.issue: CreditCard icon was used but not imported from lucide-react

passed_tests: Backend: Mobile Money initiate validates +243 phone format
Backend: Mobile Money initiate requires non-empty cart
Frontend: Checkout page has NO Stripe/Credit Card option
Frontend: Mobile Money payment option present with 4 providers (M-Pesa, Airtel, Orange, Africell)
Frontend: Cash on Delivery option present
Frontend: Mobile Money phone input with +243 format
action_items: Minor: Update OrderCreate model comment to remove 'stripe' from payment_method options (line 172 in server.py)
critical_code_review_comments: CheckoutPage.js had leftover Stripe code that was causing runtime errors - FIXED
CreditCard icon import was missing - FIXED
Minor: useEffect in CheckoutPage.js has missing dependencies warning (fetchCart, navigate)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stripe has been completely removed from both backend and frontend. CheckoutPage.js was fixed to remove leftover Stripe polling code. All 3 payment methods (PayPal, Mobile Money, COD) are working. Mobile Money flow includes phone validation (+243 format), OTP sending, resend OTP, and verify OTP endpoints. Twilio SMS is real but may fail in preview environment - OTP is stored in DB for verification.

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: CheckoutPage.js still contained Stripe-related code after main agent's removal attempt: (1) pollStripeStatus function and useEffect using undefined 'searchParams' variable, (2) CreditCard icon used but not imported
reproduction_steps: 2. Frontend would crash due to 'searchParams is not defined' error
3. Even if that was fixed, CreditCard icon would cause 'CreditCard is not defined' error
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Removed the Stripe polling useEffect and pollStripeStatus function (lines 75-103), added CreditCard to lucide-react imports
